products.name: Operator OS
products.summary: The recurring software offer for teams that want an AI-managed system for execution, automation, and release workflows.
products.idealFor: Founders, small teams, and technical operators
products.outcome: Create subscription revenue from a product that helps work actually get shipped.

products.name: Launch Sprint
products.summary: A done-with-you implementation package that sets up messaging, pages, workflows, and the first operating system for delivery.
products.idealFor: Buyers who want speed over self-setup
products.outcome: Generate service revenue while increasing product adoption and customer success.

products.name: Enterprise Deployment
products.summary: A high-trust self-hosted and customization path for organizations that need governance, control, and rollout support.
products.idealFor: Internal platform teams and compliance-sensitive buyers
products.outcome: Create larger contracts with lower churn and deeper integration.
